string_list_data.value: Stunning latte art at this tiny roaster in Palermo 🇦🇷 #specialtycoffee #buenosaires #latteart #thirdwave

Street art in the Gothic Quarter 🎨 Barcelona never disappoints #streetart #barcelona #urbanart #gothic
Natural wine flight at this cave bar in San Telmo — every glass a discovery 🍷 #naturalwine #santelmo #winebar #buenosaires
Pastéis de nata at Manteigaria — watching them bake right in front of you 🥐 #pasteisdenata #lisbon #portuguesefood #pastry
Tango milonga at La Viruta — raw, authentic, unforgettable 💃 #tango #buenosaires #milonga #dance #culture

Morning run along Barceloneta beach — best way to start the day 🏃‍♂️🌊 #running #barcelona #beach #morningrun #fitness

Fresh percebes at Cervejaria Ramiro — the thing I dream about 🦐 #seafood #lisbon #ramiro #percebes #foodie
